StructurePhase.Reference: Spooner F.J., Acta Crystallogr., Sect. A: Cryst. Phys., Diffr., Theor. Gen. Crystallogr., v24 p605 (1968)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO2. LPF Collection Code: 1503601. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Mo0.65Os0.35. Compound Preparation: irradiated by fast neutrons under vacuum. CRUCIBLE: sealed aluminum tube. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: LPF Editor Comment: same sample studied in Acta Crystallographica (1964) 17, 1533-1538. Article Title: Irradiation Effects in Binary σ Phases. Wyckoff Sequence: j i2 g a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.

StructurePhase.Reference: Stecher P., Benesovsky F., Nowotny H., Monatsh. Chem., v94 p1154 (1963)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: NO3. LPF Collection Code: 532783. Sample Preparation: STARTING MATERIALS:Ge,Mo. Compound Preparation: powder metallurgical technique. Article Title: Untersuchungen im System Molybdan-Wolfram-Germanium. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. LPF Editor Comment: editor deduced probable site occupation from nominal composition. Wyckoff Sequence: c a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
